title: Ahoy Pirate Round Dinner Plates (22cm) - Vibrant Blue Party Plates with Unique Pirate Design - Ideal for Themed Parties & Celebrations - 8ct
features: VIBRANT BLUE DESIGN: Set sail for a memorable party with our ahoy pirate round dinner plates, featuring an eye-catching and unique pirate design on a vibrant blue background – perfect for pirate-themed celebrations and events.
STURDY & DURABLE MATERIAL: Made from high-quality, sturdy material that withstands the heartiest of feasts, ensuring your guests can enjoy everything on offer without any plate mishaps.

IDEAL FOR THEMED PARTIES & CELEBRATIONS: Whether it's a pirate-themed birthday party, an adventurous treasure hunt, or any other fancy-dress celebration, these ahoy pirate round dinner plates add the perfect touch to elevate your event's atmosphere.
DISPOSABLE CONVENIENCE: Cleanup is a breeze with these disposable plates, granting you more time to enjoy your party and less time spent washing dishes.
PACK OF 8 DINNER PLATES: Make sure every guest is fully equipped with these eye-catching, sturdy, and disposable plates; perfect for effortless entertaining and a memorable pirate-themed feast.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Midnight Black Ruby Red Neon Yellow Royal Blue Ahoy Pirate Birthday Add-On Items Set sail for fun and adventure this Birthday and WOW your guests with these pirate designs! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More Coordinating Ranges Available! Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights! And if Ahoy Pirate isn't your taste, check out our other stylish options.
